response.justification: The candidate is a highly experienced and versatile software engineer, but they fundamentally lack the mandatory qualifications for this specific role. They do not have the required 5-10 years of hands-on C++ development experience on Windows, possessing only a brief 7-month stint using C/C++ nearly a decade ago. Furthermore, they lack the required enterprise database experience (SQL Server/Oracle) and have no relevant domain expertise in Fixed Income, Investment Banking, or Capital Markets.
strengths: Over 15 years of versatile software engineering experience across multiple languages (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, Java).
Strong foundation in modern software craftsmanship, including TDD, CI/CD pipelines, and microservices architecture.
Demonstrated leadership and initiative, including founding an open-source platform and conducting technical workshops.
concerns: Fails to meet the mandatory requirement of 5-10 years of C++ development experience.
Lacks required domain knowledge in Fixed Income, Capital Markets, or Investment Banking.
No evidence of Windows platform development or experience with SQL Server/Oracle.
